markdown:
Manage your delivery your way - get real-time notifications and personalize how your packages arrive with **Purolator Your Way**.

[Create a Profile](https://www.purolator.com/en/track-manage-deliveries-receivers#input-form "Purolator Your Way[sup]TM[/sup]")

![Mobile SMS](https://www.purolator.com/sites/default/files/styles/inline_image/public/icon-mobile-sms.png?itok=_3SPNA0U)

Avoid missed deliveries.

Track your package with SMS notifications.

[Get started](https://www.purolator.com/en/subscribe-purolator-your-way-sms-notifications#input-form "Subscribe to Purolator Your Way™ for SMS notifications")

Loading...

# ![Track a Shipment](https://web.purolator.com/app/tracker/img/tracker-icon.png)Track a Shipment [Search Help](https://www.purolator.com/en/shipping/tracker?pins=XYZZYPLUGH9876543210ABCDEF\#)

Enter a PIN or Reference

Enter a Tracking Number / PIN or Reference.

Searh is limited to 3000 characters

Pin or Reference must be no longer than 35 characters.

Track Now

Searh is limited to 3000 characters

Pin or Reference must be no longer than 35 characters.

[Single PIN/Reference](https://www.purolator.com/en/shipping/tracker?pins=XYZZYPLUGH9876543210ABCDEF#)
